ai_tips: Starting out at 14m — 2.52km ahead with 24m of climbing on the profile. 从海拔14米出发——全程2.52公里，累计爬升24米。
0.30km in — pace 5:52/km as the effort builds. 进行到0.30公里——配速5:52/公里，强度正在建立。
Halfway to the high point — 0m of the 5m climb done, grade here 6.3%. Short, quick steps keep this efficient. 爬升至最高点过半——5米总爬升已完成0米，此处坡度6.3%。缩小步幅、加快步频会更省力。
High point of the route: 19m at 1.11km. From here the route mostly gives back. 全程最高点19米，位于1.11公里处。此后路线总体向下。
Steepest descent of the day: -19% at 1.33km — you let it flow at 7:21/km, good downhill confidence. 全天最陡的下坡：1.33公里处坡度-19%——你顺势加速到7:21/公里，下坡信心不错。
2.31km — late-run check: pace 15:09/km, effort showing as the pace slips. 2.31公里——后程检查：配速15:09/公里，疲劳显现，配速下滑。
Finished 2.52km in 17:56 (avg 7:07/km, +24m). Solid, steady effort end to end. 完成2.52公里，用时17:56（平均配速7:07/公里，爬升24米）。全程稳定扎实。
